title: DeepWork Reviews Configuration
description: Configuration schema for .deepreview files used by the deepwork CLI.

^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$.description: A named review rule defining what to match and how to review it.

description.description: A short description of what this review rule checks for.

lifecycle.description: Optional review lifecycle settings. Omit to use normal change-cycle reviews.

cadence.description: When this rule should run. change_cycle rules run in normal reviews and quality gates; pull_request rules run only in PR review mode.

match.description: Defines the file glob patterns that trigger this review rule.

include.description: List of glob patterns to include in the trigger.

exclude.description: List of glob patterns to exclude from the trigger.

review.description: Defines how the matched files should be grouped and reviewed by the AI agent.

strategy.description: How to batch the review tasks for the matched files.

cache.description: Optional pass-cache invalidation settings for this review rule.

invalidates_on.description: What makes a passed review stale. file_content re-runs when reviewed file contents change; changed_file_set re-runs only when the set of reviewed changed files changes.

agent.description: Optional mapping of CLI providers to specific agent personas. If omitted, the default agent is used.

^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$.description: The specific persona or model name to use for this provider (e.g., 'security-expert').

instructions.description: The prompt instructions for the review. Can be a literal string or a reference to an external file.

anyOf.description: Inline text instructions for the review.

file.description: Path to a markdown file containing the review instructions.

precomputed_info_for_reviewer_bash_comma.description: A shell command whose stdout is captured and injected into the review instruction file as precomputed context. The command path is resolved relative to the .deepreview file's directory and executed from the project root.

reference_files.description: Files whose contents should be inlined into the review instructions (subject to size/count caps). Paths are resolved relative to the .deepreview file's directory.

path.description: Path to a reference file, relative to the .deepreview file's directory.

description.description: Optional short description shown alongside the inlined contents.

additional_context.description: Optional flags to include additional context in the AI's prompt.

all_changed_filenames.description: If true, includes a list of all files changed in the PR/commit.

unchanged_matching_files.description: If true, pulls the full contents of files that match the include patterns even if they weren't modified in this diff.

review_depth.description: Optional review depth hint. When set to 'lightweight' on a job.yml review block, the workflow's common_job_info preamble is omitted from the review instruction file. Note: this field has no effect in .deepreview rules — those rules are not associated with a workflow and do not receive common_job_info. Omit for standard depth (default).
